category_sources: source_facts.description says sngrep displays SIP call message flows; official GitHub README describes a terminal SIP packet/message-flow viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository identify the project as sngrep.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage and points to the official GitHub Wiki FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/irontec/sngrep, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README mention SIP flows, terminal UI, live capture, and PCAP viewing.
